items.summary: New research from ProjectDiscovery surfaces an uncomfortable truth: Engineering has accelerated, and Security has been left to absorb the impact, mostly by hand. If you work in application security right now, you already know the shape of t…

items.title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: ConnectWise ScreenConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute remote code or directly impact confidential data and critical systems.

items.title: Microsoft Windows Protection Mechanism Failure Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Windows Shell contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

items.title: Benchmarking Neo's Black-Box DAST Capabilities
items.summary: Since the launch of Neo, we've been steadily expanding what it can do. Neo has found 33+ real CVEs across open-source projects, performed well on white-box security testing where source code is available, and generally proven itself as a ca…

items.title: D-Link DIR-823X Command Injection Vulnerability
items.summary: D-Link DIR-823X contains a command injection vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to execute arbitrary commands on remote devices by sending a POST request to /goform/set_prohibiting via the corresponding function. The impacted…

items.title: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an attacker to write arbitrary files as system authority.

items.title: SimpleHelp Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: SimpleHelp contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows admin users to upload arbitrary files anywhere on the file system by uploading a crafted zip file (i.e. zip slip). This can be exploited to execute arbitrary code on the host in…

items.title: SimpleHelp Missing Authorization Vulnerability
items.summary: SimpleHelp contains a missing authorization vulnerability that could allow low-privileged technicians to create API keys with excessive permissions. These API keys can be used to escalate privileges to the server admin role.

items.title: Marimo Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
items.summary: Marimo contains an pre-authorization remote code execution vulnerability, allowing an unauthenticated attacked to shell access and execute arbitrary system commands.

items.title: Microsoft Defender Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Defender contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that could allow an authorized attacker to escalate privileges locally.

items.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs Vulnerability
items.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an incorrect use of privileged APIs vulnerability due to improper file handling on the API interface of an affected system. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a malicious file on…

items.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor Vulnerability
items.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to view sensitive information on affected systems.

items.title: Kentico Xperience Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: Kentico Xperience contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated user's Staging Sync Server to upload arbitrary data to path relative locations.

items.title: PaperCut NG/MF Improper Authentication Vulnerability
items.summary: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class.

items.title: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-site Scripting Vulnerability
items.summary: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the user's session, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive information…

items.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Storing Passwords in a Recoverable Format Vulnerability
items.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a storing passwords in a recoverable format vulnerability that allows an authenticated, local attacker to gain DCA user privileges by accessing a credential file for the DCA user on the filesystem as a…

items.title: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) Improper Authentication Vulnerability
items.summary: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow attackers to impersonate legitimate users without valid credentials.

items.title: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed.

items.title: Neo v. DIY: The gap between a single finding and a mature security program
items.summary: In our latest webinar, our Founding Solutions Engineer, Davis Franklin, addressed the massive gap between finding a vulnerability with an LLM and running a mature security program. That gap is what Neo is built to close. With the release of…

items.title: Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
items.summary: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.

items.title: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
items.summary: Microsoft Office Excel contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take complete control of an affected system if a user opens a specially crafted Excel file that includes a malformed object.

items.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

items.title: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications Insecure Library Loading Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) contains an insecure library loading vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution.

items.title: Microsoft Windows Link Following Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Windows contains a link following vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation

items.title: Microsoft Exchange Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data that allows an authenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution.

items.title: Microsoft Windows Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System Driver contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that could allow a threat actor for privileges escalation

items.title: Adobe Acrobat Use-After-Free Vulnerability
items.summary: Adobe Acrobat contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows for code execution

items.title: Fortinet FortiClient EMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
items.summary: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains a SQL injection vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests.

items.title: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Prototype Pollution Vulnerability
items.summary: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a prototype pollution vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution.

items.title: How We Cut LLM Costs by 59% With Prompt Caching
items.summary: At ProjectDiscovery, we've been building Neo, an autonomous security testing platform that runs multi-agent, multi-step workflows, routinely executing 20-40+ LLM steps per task. Vulnerability assessments, code reviews, and security audits a…
